trans-unit.source: An error was encountered when reading '{0}': {1}
trans-unit.note: {0} is file path. {1} is exception message.

trans-unit.source: Unable to determine a temporary directory path. Consider configuring the TEMP environment variable on Windows or local app data folder on Unix.
trans-unit.target: 无法确定临时目录路径。请考虑在 Windows 上配置 TEMP 环境变量，或在 Unix 上配置本地应用数据文件夹。

trans-unit.source: This is an experimental feature, set MSBuild property '{0}' to 'true' to enable it.
trans-unit.target: 这是一项实验性功能，将 MSBuild 属性 '{0}' 设置为 'true' 以启用它。

trans-unit.source: File included via #:include directive (or Compile item) not found: {0}
trans-unit.target: 找不到通过 #:include 指令(或 Compile 项)包含的文件: {0}

trans-unit.source: A launch profile with the name '{0}' doesn't exist.
trans-unit.target: 名为“{0}”的启动配置文件不存在。

trans-unit.source: The launch profile type '{0}' is not supported.
trans-unit.target: 不支持启动配置文件类型“{0}”。

trans-unit.source: A profile with the specified name isn't a valid JSON object.
trans-unit.target: 具有指定名称的配置文件不是有效的 JSON 对象。

trans-unit.source: The 'profiles' property of the launch settings document is not a JSON object.
trans-unit.target: 启动设置文档的“profiles”属性不是 JSON 对象。

trans-unit.source: Cannot use launch profile '{0}' because the launch settings file could not be located. Locations tried: {1}
trans-unit.target: 无法使用启动配置文件“{0}”，因为找不到启动设置文件。已尝试的位置: {1}

trans-unit.source: Warning: Settings from '{0}' are not used because '{1}' has precedence.
trans-unit.target: 警告: 不使用 ‘{0}’ 中的设置，因为 ‘{1}’ 具有优先级。
trans-unit.note: {0} is an app.run.json file path. {1} is a launchSettings.json file path.

trans-unit.source: A usable launch profile could not be located.
trans-unit.target: 找不到可用的启动配置文件。
